name: Scale
description: When a unit with the Scale keyword makes a Climb, it may Move a vertical distance up to height 2. When a unit that has the Scale keyword makes a Move, it does not reduce its Speed for moving out of, into, or through diﬃcult terrain.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Scale keyword makes a Climb, it may Move a vertical distance up to height 2. When a unit that has the Scale keyword makes a Move, it does not reduce its Speed for moving out of, into, or through diﬃcult terrain.
